title: CBIC Extends Validity of Customs Facilitation Circulars Till June 30, 2026
content:
# CBIC Extends Validity of Customs Facilitation Circulars Till June 30, 2026

Ek important update hai for all importers and exporters! Government ne kuch Customs Facilitation Circulars ki validity extend karne ka announce kiya hai.

This move aims to provide continued relief amidst ongoing maritime route disruptions.

*   **Circular Number & Date:** The extension has been announced vide Circular No. 25/2026-Customs dated May 14, 2026.
*   **What's Extended:** The Central Board of Indirect Taxes and Customs (CBIC) has extended the validity of various circulars issued under Section 143AA of the Customs Act, 1962. These circulars address challenges arising from disruptions in maritime routes, specifically due to the closure of the Strait of Hormuz.
*   **Old Validity:** These facilitations were previously set to expire.
*   **New Validity:** The validity of these circulars now stands extended until June 30, 2026.
*   **Key Detail:** All other facilities, terms, and conditions stipulated in the said circulars will remain unchanged.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://taxinformation.cbic.gov.in/view-pdf/1003325/ENG/Circulars)

*Published on: 17 May 2026*
